# Pull Request

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and the motivation behind it.  
List any related issues or PRs.

- What does this PR do?
- Why is this change necessary?

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Related Issues / Tickets

- Closes # (issue number)
- Relates to # (issue number)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.  
Include details of your testing environment and relevant test cases.

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/ruslanora/kin/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] There is not similar issue or PR already open for this
- [ ] My code follows the project’s style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the pull request here.  
Include screenshots, logs, or references if applicable.
